case_title: JOYCE WORD VS. ANIMAL INTERNAL MEDICINE AND SPECIALTY SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,033.84 FILED BY WORD, JOYCE AS TO DEFENDANT ANIMAL INTERNAL MEDICINE AND SPECIALTY SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WORD, JOYCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANIMAL INTERNAL MEDICINE AND SPECIALTY SERVICES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JUN-09-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANIMAL INTERNAL MEDICINE AND SPECIALTY SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-21-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOYCE WARD IS PRESENT. RAQUEL RICHIE, WITNESS, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ANIMAL INTERNAL MEDICINE AND SPECIALITY, REPRESENTED BY JILL WILLIAMS, OWNER, IS PRESENT. WITNESSES GREG GONZALES, KATIE CORRIGAN TESTIFY ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2019 - JUDGMENT.
